allow: Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select id, email, full_name, is_admin, membership_tier, points, membership_expiry from profiles order by created_at limit 20;")
Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select count\(*\) total, count\(*\) filter \(where is_admin\) admins from profiles;")
Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema='public' order by table_name;")

Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select 'posts' t, count\(*\) from posts union all select 'friendships',count\(*\) from friendships union all select 'clubs',count\(*\) from clubs union all select 'club_members',count\(*\) from club_members union all select 'club_memberships',count\(*\) from club_memberships union all select 'events',count\(*\) from events union all select 'event_registrations',count\(*\) from event_registrations union all select 'jobs',count\(*\) from jobs union all select 'products',count\(*\) from products union all select 'perks',count\(*\) from perks union all select 'donations',count\(*\) from donations union all select 'transactions',count\(*\) from transactions;")

Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select tablename, policyname, cmd, qual, with_check from pg_policies where schemaname='public' and tablename in \('friendships','posts','clubs','club_memberships','club_members','events','event_registrations','chat_conversations','chat_participants','chat_messages','perks'\) order by tablename, cmd;")

Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select tc.table_name, tc.constraint_name, kcu.column_name, ccu.table_name as ref_table from information_schema.table_constraints tc join information_schema.key_column_usage kcu on tc.constraint_name=kcu.constraint_name join information_schema.constraint_column_usage ccu on tc.constraint_name=ccu.constraint_name where tc.constraint_type='FOREIGN KEY' and tc.table_schema='public' and tc.table_name in \('friendships','events','jobs','posts','event_registrations'\) order by tc.table_name;")

Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select proname from pg_proc where proname in \('ensure_chat_conversation','award_points','is_admin','is_conversation_member','is_chat_participant_member','is_application_party'\) order by proname;")

Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema='public' and table_name in \('saved_posts','comments','post_reactions'\);")
Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select key, value from system_settings order by key;")

Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select event_object_table tbl, trigger_name, action_timing, event_manipulation, action_statement from information_schema.triggers where trigger_schema='public' and event_object_table in \('posts','events','friendships','club_memberships','event_registrations','jobs','products','perks'\) order by tbl, trigger_name;")

Bash("/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" scripts/db-run.mjs -q "select tablename, policyname, cmd, qual, with_check from pg_policies where schemaname='public' and tablename in \('jobs','notifications','event_registrations','donations','transactions'\) order by tablename, cmd;")
